title: Irregular Periods and Hirsutism - PCOS
chief_complaint: 24-year-old with irregular periods since menarche (every 2-3 months), excessive facial hair growth, acne, and weight gain. BMI 30. Trying to conceive for 8 months without success.

hidden_data.us_pelvis: Polycystic ovaries: >12 follicles per ovary, ovarian volume >10mL
hidden_data.hormones: LH/FSH ratio: 2.5, Testosterone: 85 ng/dL (elevated), DHEAS: normal

key_learning_points: Rotterdam: 2 of 3 = oligo/anovulation + hyperandrogenism + polycystic ovaries
Lifestyle: weight loss improves all parameters
OCPs for menstrual regulation and hirsutism
Letrozole or clomiphene for ovulation induction

patient_responses.periods: I get my period every 2-3 months since I was 14
patient_responses.hair: I have dark hair on my face and chest

feedback.correct_message: Well diagnosed! PCOS meeting all 3 Rotterdam criteria.
feedback.incorrect_message: This is PCOS. Rotterdam criteria are met.
feedback.attending_note: PCOS: Weight loss 5-10% (first-line). OCPs for menstrual regulation + hirsutism. Metformin 1500-2000mg for insulin resistance. Letrozole 2.5-5mg for ovulation induction. Screen for OSA, lipids, glucose annually.
